search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com results only. Prioritized English guide pages over generic home pages. Kept leads focused on heroes and research discovery.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with character list, hero equipment, and faction/filter views. Good lead for hero discovery and equipment cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, tiers, factions, and gear references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research guide page with category tabs and per-level badge cost tables. Strong lead for research-tree discovery and cost mapping.
results.primary_user_job: Check research categories and level-by-level badge costs.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide with early hero and progression advice. Useful for broad onboarding context, not as proof of mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Understand early-game progression and first heroes.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event overview with a research-themed round and a hero-upgrade round, plus reward tables and cycle timing.
results.primary_user_job: Find which event tasks use research, hero XP, fragments, and tickets.
claims_to_verify: Exact point sources for Age of Science and Hero Initiative
Daily cycle schedule by Apocalypse Time
Reward chest contents and ranking payouts

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core building page for unlocking and upgrading tech research.
results.primary_user_job: Check research building unlocks, second lab conditions, and upgrade effects.
claims_to_verify: HQ level needed to unlock the Laboratory

results.title: Bookstore | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Bonus building that increases research speed and has upgrade data.
results.primary_user_job: Verify structures that boost research speed for optimization guides.
claims_to_verify: Assignable refugee type and upgrade costs

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to mmediamreza.com and returned multiple Last Z-specific guide pages suitable for topic discovery. Generic homepage results were ignored. No claims were marked ready.

results.evidence_summary: Shows a unit-training guide with upgrade table, unlock conditions, and progression data for Shooter Camp.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and unit training
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed by level

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Covers Assaulter Camp training, cap, speed, and power growth for combat progression.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and troop training

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Describes the Laboratory as the research hub, including progression and second-lab unlocking.
results.primary_user_job: Understand research progress and Lab unlock path
